entries.title: Shipping and Delivery
entries.description: Shipping and Delivery: please note, that it might take 2-3 business days before your order is shipped from our warehouse. Once shipped you will receive e-mail with a tracking link. Depending on a courier, the link might not be active within the first 2 business days. Shipping costs are based on package weight.
